__TSKB.ROOT__.desc: The root directory (automatically added by tskb)

docs.desc: A folder that contains all the repo docs (.tskb.tsx) files. Uses its own ts configuration.

files.name: tsconfig.json
files.desc: An example of required tsconfig.json for building <TSKB> docs

packages.desc: A folder that contains independent packages in the repo (npm worskspace)

folders.name: tskb
folders.desc: The root folder of the package, with its package.json and main npm README.md

references.desc: A folder that contains git tracked references used for documentation illustration purposes, referenced on npm

tests.desc: End-to-end tests for the tskb CLI.

folders.name: e2e
folders.desc: E2E test files that run the CLI and check its output.

tests.e2e.desc: E2E test files that run the CLI and check its output.

folders.name: fixture
folders.desc: A small sample project used as the test subject — like a real repo that adopted tskb.

files.name: build.test.ts
files.desc: Tests for `tskb build` output.

files.name: commands.test.ts
files.desc: Tests for every query command.

files.name: disambiguation.test.ts
files.desc: Tests for resolving identifiers that match more than one node.

files.name: global-setup.ts
files.desc: Builds the fixture graph once before tests run; cleans up after.

files.name: graph-integrity.test.ts
files.desc: Tests that the built graph is internally consistent.

files.name: helpers.ts
files.desc: Shared helpers used by every test file.

files.name: init.test.ts
files.desc: Tests for `tskb init`.

tests.e2e.fixture.desc: A small sample project used as the test subject — like a real repo that adopted tskb.

folders.name: docs
folders.desc: Fixture .tskb.tsx docs covering all doc priorities.

tests.e2e.fixture.docs.desc: Fixture .tskb.tsx docs covering all doc priorities.

TSKB.Package.Root.desc: The root folder of the package, with its package.json and main npm README.md

folders.name: explorer-app
folders.desc: The browser app shown by the explorer.

files.name: package.json
files.desc: Library's package.json file

files.name: index.ts
files.desc: CLI entry point. Routes arguments to a command.

tskb.core.desc: Core build logic: registry extraction, doc extraction, graph assembly.

folders.name: explorer
folders.desc: Server side of the explorer: turns the graph into chunks and serves them.

folders.name: extraction
folders.desc: Reads registry and docs out of TypeScript source.

folders.name: graph
folders.desc: Builds the knowledge graph from extracted registry and docs.

tskb.runtime.desc: Registry types and JSX primitives. No runtime code — these are the types and tags users import.

files.name: jsx.ts
files.desc: All JSX tags users can write inside .tskb.tsx files.

files.name: registry.ts
files.desc: Type definitions for the registry primitives (Folder, Module, Export, Term, File, External).

tskb.explorer.core.desc: Server side of the explorer: turns the graph into chunks and serves them.

files.name: export.ts
files.desc: Writes the explorer as a self-contained static folder.

files.name: server.ts
files.desc: HTTP server for the explorer. Serves the SPA and the chunk API.

files.name: transform.ts
files.desc: Turns the graph into chunks the SPA can load.

tskb.explorer.app.desc: The browser app shown by the explorer.

tskb.explorer.app.components.desc: Node and edge components drawn on the canvas.

files.name: BoundaryRenderer.ts
files.desc: Draws an outline around nodes that share a boundary.

tskb.explorer.app.graph.desc: Data layer for the SPA. Loads and caches chunks.

files.name: chunk-types.ts
files.desc: Type definitions for the chunks the SPA loads.

files.name: loader.ts
files.desc: Loads chunks. Caches recent ones; de-duplicates parallel requests.

tskb.explorer.app.layout.desc: Layout engine that positions nodes on the canvas.

files.name: lane-engine.ts
files.desc: Lays out visible nodes on the canvas.

tskb.explorer.app.store.desc: Holds the loaded graph data for the SPA.

files.name: graph-store.ts
files.desc: Holds the loaded graph data for the SPA.

tskb.explorer.app.ui.desc: UI bits around the canvas: spinners, tooltips, popups.

files.name: CodeTooltip.ts
files.desc: Code preview popup shown for module nodes.

files.name: DocPanel.ts
files.desc: Slide-in side panel host. Owns the chrome and renders whichever view the router has on top.

files.name: DomTooltip.ts
files.desc: Tooltip anchored to a DOM element, used by the doc panel.

files.name: NodeTooltip.ts
files.desc: Hover tooltip for canvas nodes.

files.name: Spinner.ts
files.desc: Global and per-node loading spinners.

tskb.explorer.app.router.views.desc: Panel view classes — one per addressable panel state. Each implements the View interface.

files.name: RefsView.ts
files.desc: Panel view listing every doc or flow that references a given node.

tskb.explorer.app.router.components.desc: Reusable UI chunks shared across panel views (accordion, ref-link wiring).

files.name: Accordion.ts
files.desc: HTML builder for the docs/flows accordion shared across panel views.

files.name: RefLinks.ts
files.desc: Wires hover, click and prefetch behavior on a.tskb-ref anchors inside panel views.

tskb.explorer.app.workers.desc: Web Workers for the explorer SPA.

files.name: search.worker.ts
files.desc: Web Worker that loads the search index and runs Fuse.js queries off the main thread.

core.extraction.desc: Reads registry and docs out of TypeScript source.

files.name: module-morphology.ts
files.desc: Reads each module's exports and imports, with type stubs.

files.name: registry.ts
files.desc: Reads Folders, Modules, Exports, and Terms from the registry types.

core.extraction.graph.desc: Builds the knowledge graph from extracted registry and docs.

files.name: builder.ts
files.desc: Assembles the graph from extracted data.

files.name: types.ts
files.desc: Type definitions for the knowledge graph.

files.name: writer.ts
files.desc: Writes the graph to disk as per-type JSON files under `.tskb/graph/`.

files.name: build.ts
files.desc: The `tskb build` command.

files.name: explore.ts
files.desc: The `tskb explore` command.

files.name: flows.ts
files.desc: The `tskb flows` command.

files.name: init.ts
files.desc: The `tskb init` command. Scaffolds a new docs folder.

files.name: ls.ts
files.desc: The `tskb ls` command.

files.name: pick.ts
files.desc: The `tskb pick` command.

files.name: search.ts
files.desc: The `tskb search` command.

files.name: content-builder.ts
files.desc: Shared markdown content for the generated skill and instructions files.

files.name: copilot-instructions-generator.ts
files.desc: Writes the Copilot instructions files for tskb.

files.name: graph-finder.ts
files.desc: Finds the `.tskb/graph/` directory for the current project.

files.name: graph-loader.ts
files.desc: Loads the split graph from `.tskb/graph/`, reading only the node types the caller needs.

files.name: logger.ts
files.desc: Logger for CLI output.

files.name: resolve-node.ts
files.desc: Resolves an identifier (ID or path) to a graph node and helps walk its edges.

files.name: skill-generator.ts
files.desc: Writes the Claude Code skill files for tskb.
